sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] CYBIN INC. Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: This article details an amended Schedule 13G/A filing for Cybin Inc. (CYBN), disclosing updated passive investment stakes by Millennium-related entities and Israel A. Englander. Integrated Core Strategies (US) LLC now holds 5.5% (2,730,560 shares), while Millennium Management LLC, Millennium Group Management LLC, and Israel A. Englander each report 5.7% (2,829,893 shares). The filing emphasizes shared voting and dispositive power and includes a Joint Filing Agreement dated April 21, 2026.

feed.title: Director at Warrior Met Coal (NYSE: HCC) receives 1,423 RSUs as equity award
feed.summary: Alan H. Schumacher, a director at Warrior Met Coal, Inc. (NYSE: HCC), has been granted 1,423 restricted stock units (RSUs) under the company's 2026 Equity Incentive Plan. These RSUs, with an exercise price of $0.00, will vest on April 20, 2027, and be settled in common stock upon the termination of his directorship, as per his deferral election. This award adds to a previous grant of 2,534 RSUs from the 2017 plan, which vest in April 2026 and are similarly deferred.

feed.title: Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac Move Beyond FICO With New Credit Scoring Model To Boost Competition
feed.summary: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac are moving beyond the traditional FICO credit scoring model by adopting VantageScore 4.0 and FICO Score 10T to expand homeownership access and enhance competition. This change, authorized by a 2018 law and proposed by FHFA, marks the first major update to mortgage credit scoring in decades. The move is expected to particularly benefit borrowers previously overlooked, while shares of Fair Isaac Corp. (FICO) saw a decline following the news.

feed.title: Arrow Electronics Reference Design Board Features Bourns, Microchip, Amphenol Technologies
feed.summary: Arrow Electronics has launched the 10BASE-T1S REF_SPE_T1S reference design board, developed in collaboration with Microchip Technology Inc., Bourns Inc., and Amphenol. This platform is designed to help engineers implement Single Pair Ethernet (SPE) by evaluating signal integrity, EMC behavior, and noise immunity in industrial applications. The board highlights the critical role of Bourns' integrated magnetics alongside Microchip's PHY and Amphenol's connector in achieving robust and reliable SPE connectivity.

feed.title: Apollo nears $1.6 bln deal for auto interiors business of France's Forvia, Bloomberg News reports
feed.summary: Private equity firm Apollo Global Management is reportedly close to acquiring the auto interiors business of French supplier Forvia for approximately 1.4 billion euros ($1.64 billion). This potential deal comes as Forvia seeks to divest the unit to reduce debt. Forvia, which supplies major automakers like Stellantis, Volkswagen, and Ford, had previously indicated a projected decline in sales for 2026.

feed.title: KeyCorp’s Clearwater UK Deal Tests Expansion Strategy And Valuation Gap
feed.summary: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) is acquiring Clearwater UK, an investment banking advisory firm, marking its first expansion into Western Europe. This move signals KeyCorp's intent to broaden its investment banking capabilities globally, despite prior investor opposition to acquisitions. The acquisition's success will depend on effective integration and alignment with existing U.S. operations, and will be a key indicator for shareholders regarding management's strategic priorities.

feed.title: Applied Materials unveils advanced systems for smaller AI chips
feed.summary: Applied Materials has introduced two new chipmaking systems designed to create the smallest features in advanced logic chips for AI. These systems enable atomic-level precision in materials deposition, helping chipmakers build faster and more power-efficient transistors at 2nm and beyond for Gate-All-Around (GAA) architectures. The technologies address the increasing complexity of AI compute demand by improving isolation and metal gate structures, crucial for enhancing performance and power efficiency.

feed.title: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd Sells 115,235 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Alphinity Investment Management Pty Ltd has reduced its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation by 28.2%, selling 115,235 shares, but Costco remains its 23rd largest position. This divestment occurs as Costco increases its quarterly dividend to $1.47 and reports slightly better-than-expected earnings. However, the stock's high P/E ratio and competitive landscape suggest potential valuation concerns, leading some analysts to recommend alternative investments.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Equifax (EFX) Record Quarter, Higher 2026 Outlook And Buybacks
feed.summary: Equifax Inc. reported a record first quarter in April 2026, with strong revenue and net income, and raised its full-year 2026 revenue guidance. The company also announced a significant share repurchase program and expanded its Workforce Solutions offerings. This article examines how these positive developments reinforce the investment narrative for Equifax, focusing on its data, verification, and cloud platforms despite ongoing macro and regulatory headwinds.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Overhaul Lifts Earnings While Valuation Signals Stay Stretched
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) has demonstrated a positive shift in its financial performance, returning to positive earnings in Q1 2026 after implementing significant business model overhauls, including assigned seating, new bag fees, and a revamped loyalty program. Despite these improvements and being named the Best U.S. Airline of 2025, the stock's valuation is signaled as stretched, trading at a significant premium to its estimated fair value. Though recent share price momentum shows a cooling trend, the key for investors will be monitoring the durability of these earnings and how customer response and competitive positioning evolve.

feed.title: UBS Raises its Price Target on Occidental Petroleum (OXY) to $67
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Occidental Petroleum (OXY) to $67 from $64, maintaining a Neutral rating, despite concerns about Middle East exposure. This change follows Occidental's announcement of a new oil discovery in the Gulf of America and a previous price target raise by Wells Fargo to $72. The article also touches upon the broader context of energy stocks and opportunities in AI investments.

feed.title: Japan's Honda to stop selling cars in South Korea at end-2026
feed.summary: Honda Motor will cease its automobile sales operations in South Korea at the end of 2026, citing changes in the global and South Korean automotive markets. The Japanese automaker, which began selling cars in South Korea in 2004, has been offering the Accord and CR-V models in the market. The decision reflects evolving market conditions that prompted the company to withdraw.

feed.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Keurig Dr Pepper Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: Ahead of its Q1 earnings report, Wall Street analysts have updated their expectations for Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ: KDP). Analysts project earnings of 37 cents per share on $3.83 billion in revenue. Several analysts have recently adjusted their ratings and price targets for KDP stock.

feed.title: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) Given Average Recommendation of "Hold" by Analysts

The company reported slightly missed EPS but beat revenue estimates for its last quarter and issued FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) and Kinder Morgan Advance Western Gateway Pipeline Project
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) and Kinder Morgan are moving forward with their Western Gateway Pipeline project after a successful second open season secured shipper commitments. This project aims to connect Midwest and Gulf Coast refinery supply to markets in Phoenix and California, including Las Vegas, through new pipeline construction and reversals of existing lines, targeting a mid-2029 in-service date. Analysts from Piper Sandler and Barclays have raised price targets for Phillips 66, citing expected earnings tailwinds and commodity price benefits.

feed.title: MetLife, Inc. (NYSE:MET) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: MetLife, Inc. (NYSE:MET) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 14 brokerage firms, with an average 12-month price target of $93.38. Despite some recent target trims by Morgan Stanley and Bank of America, the overall analyst sentiment remains positive, further bolstered by UBS raising its target and Wall Street Zen upgrading its rating. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $2.49 and a 27.6% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) to Release Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (MRK) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, April 30th, with analysts forecasting an EPS of ($1.3109) and revenue of $15.91 billion. The company has provided full-year 2026 guidance of $5.00-$5.15 EPS and has recently announced a multi-year partnership with Google Cloud for up to $1 billion for AI initiatives, as well as regulatory approvals for IDVYNSO and ENFLONSIA. Despite these positive developments, Merck faced a significant oncology setback with the failure of the Phase 3 LITESPARK‑012 combination study.

feed.title: Altria Group (MO) Projected to Post Earnings on Thursday
